pi_items.source: Task_utils.sh line 4: NX_BASE="https://localhost:7001"; setup_task.sh line 12 uses this endpoint; verified against task.json description authentication requirement

Task.json description explicitly states 'delete all bookmarks that are OLDER than 30 days'; setup_task.sh scenario definitions (lines 73-82) mark bookmarks with ages 40, 50, 45, 60, 90 days as requiring deletion (marked 'Old, No Hold -> DELETE') confirming 30-day threshold

Task.json description states 'contains the text LegalHold (case-insensitive)'; setup_task.sh lines 76, 77, 79 show test data with 'LegalHold' and 'legalhold' variants; verifier.py line 73 checks 'legalhold' in b['description'].lower() confirming case-insensitive matching
Export_result.sh line 19: LOG_FILE="/home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt"; task.json description line 6 requires agent to save log file to this exact path

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task enforces a bookmark retention policy on Nx Witness VMS API at https://localhost:7001, deleting bookmarks older than 30 days except those with 'LegalHold' (case-insensitive) in the description, and requires logging deleted bookmark IDs to /home/ga/Documents/retention_log.txt. Test data is synthetic, created during setup via Python script generating 8 bookmarks with ages ranging 5-90 days to test policy compliance.
